title: Smoky Ukrainian Kielbasa Curry
description: A fiery, monsoon-inspired Ukrainian dish that blends smoky kielbasa with a rich, coconut‑based bhuna, creating a comforting curry that’s surprisingly vegetarian-friendly in its sauce.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add diced onion and sauté until translucent, about 4 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic, ginger, turmeric, smoked paprika, cumin, and coriander; cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add sliced kielbasa to the skillet and brown on all sides for 5 minutes.
Pour in diced tomatoes and coconut milk, stirring to combine; bring to a gentle simmer.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and let simmer for 10 minutes to meld flavors.
Add spinach leaves and cook until wilted, about 2 minutes; season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot over steamed rice or with warm flatbread, garnished with fresh cilantro if desired.
